name: heavy-slam
effect_description: Inflicts regular damage.  The greater the user’s weight compared to the target’s, the higher power this move has, to a maximum of 120.  User’s weight                    | Power -------------------------------- | ----: Up to 2× the target’s weight     |    40 Up to 3× the target’s weight     |    60 Up to 4× the target’s weight     |    80 Up to 5× the target’s weight     |   100 More than 5× the target’s weight |   120
